title: Session Transcript
description: JSON transcript companion file for session logs. Generated alongside session_logs/v{VERSION}-session.md at each conversation turn.

started_at.description: Session start time in CT with UTC, format: 'YYYY-MM-DD HH:MM CT (HH:MM UTC)'

timestamp_ct.description: Turn timestamp in Central Time, format: 'YYYY-MM-DD HH:MM CT'

timestamp_utc.description: Turn timestamp in UTC, format: 'YYYY-MM-DD HH:MM UTC'

actions.description: Ordered list of tool actions taken during this turn

outcome.description: Description of what was accomplished in this turn

files_changed.description: List of file paths created, modified, or deleted

redactions.description: List of redaction markers applied in this turn, with counts

user_input.description: Captured and proofread user input for the turn

raw_summary.description: Brief summary of what the user said, preserving original phrasing including typos, speech-to-text artifacts, and exploratory language

proofread.description: Cleaned/proofread version of user input, correcting speech-to-text errors, pauses, and ambiguities while staying close to original words

source.description: Attribution for the proofreading, e.g. 'user (proofread by Claude)'

tool.description: Tool name used for this action (e.g. 'Bash', 'Read', 'Edit', 'Write', 'Grep', 'Glob')

command.description: Command executed (for Bash actions) or file path (for Read/Edit/Write actions)

output.description: Tool output. If output exceeds 500 lines, include first 100 lines followed by '[TRUNCATED: N total lines. Summary: brief description of remaining output]'

output_lines.description: Number of lines in the output (before truncation if truncated)

truncated.description: Whether the output was truncated (true if original output exceeded 500 lines)

truncated_from.description: Original line count before truncation (present only when truncated is true)

timestamp_ct.description: Timestamp of this action in Central Time, format: 'HH:MM CT'
